report.summary: Day 70 cycle v6: No new commits since Mar 17 (7 days). Git locks still blocking all pushes (P0). 654 uncommitted files in working tree. All 6 API routes present with cache headers. 42 TS errors masked by ignoreBuildErrors. Rate limiter and defi-yields fallback remain unwired (39+ cycles).

sections.title: QA Tester
items: PUBLISHED SLUGS: 432 total in published-pages.ts. 329 have dedicated page.tsx files; 103 rely on dynamic [slug] routes or are missing.
TYPESCRIPT ERRORS: 42 errors in src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (JSX-in-TS syntax). Masked by ignoreBuildErrors:true in next.config.ts.
BUILD SAFETY: ignoreBuildErrors still active — build succeeds but type safety is compromised.
LIVE SITE: Egress blocked from sandbox — unable to verify HTTP 200s. No code changes since last verified cycle.
NO NEW REGRESSIONS: 0 commits this cycle, no new breakage introduced.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: ALL 6 CORE API ROUTES PRESENT: prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields — all have route.ts with cache headers.
CACHE HEADERS: 9 API route files contain stale-while-revalidate or Cache-Control headers.
RATE LIMITER: Only wired to cache-stats and health routes. NOT wired to the 6 core public routes (39+ cycles unfixed).
DEFI-YIELDS FALLBACK: 0 fallback data references in defi-yields/route.ts (39+ cycles unfixed).
LIVE API HEALTH: Cannot verify runtime — egress blocked. No code changes since last healthy check.

sections.title: DevOps
items: PRODUCTION: Running commit e999560 (Day 62 publish), deployed Mar 17. No new deploys in 7 days.
GIT LOCKS [P0]: .git/HEAD.lock (Mar 16 11:17) + .git/index.lock (Mar 16 13:06) — now 7 days old. All commits and pushes blocked. Fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock
WORKING TREE DRIFT: 654 uncommitted files (47 modified + 607 untracked). Stable vs last cycle (was 654 in previous check).
VERCEL: Project configured (prj_2Hn4Kdtu6fM13sSpxsdnmsJWGI75). Cannot verify panel status from sandbox.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 0 commits, 0 deploys. Development stalled by git locks.
